name: ultimate-vcf
description: Ultimate VCF — rebuilt Vibe Coder Framework. 8-phase loop with verifier-gates-acceptance, a bounded confirm loop, and a self-improving learning spine.

plugins.name: ultimate-vcf
plugins.description: 8 phase commands (/ultimate-vcf:uvcf-scope-lock, :uvcf-ground, :uvcf-shape, :uvcf-plan-check, :uvcf-build, :uvcf-confirm, :uvcf-verify, :uvcf-compound) + :uvcf-overview reference. Fixes the build↔audit moral hazard via verifier-gates-acceptance + a 2-strike loop bound; adds a decision-ledger / slice self-eval / framework-retro learning spine. Mines SICA, Eidentic, Ivy Tendril, Hive, Hermes, plus superpowers / GSD / BMAD / ecc / Karpathy.
